title: Triage Result
description: Output of triaging a customer support ticket. Field names align to schemas/enums/customer_support_taxonomy.yaml.

category.description: Triaged category. Must match taxonomy enum.

priority.description: Priority level P1-P4. P1=Critical (medical/legal/safety), P2=High, P3=Standard, P4=Low.

route_to.description: Routing destination. Must match taxonomy enum.

human_review_required.description: Whether human review is required. P1/P2 = always true.

suggested_initial_response.description: Acknowledgment-only response (not full resolution). Empty for ALL P1 cases (auto-reply suppressed — conservative policy). P2+ may have acknowledgment drafts.

internal_notes.description: Internal notes for the support team

risk_flags.description: Customer reports bleeding after device use

examples.internal_notes: P1 medical — auto-reply suppressed. Escalate immediately.

examples.suggested_initial_response: Thank you for reaching out. I've located your order and can help with the return process.
examples.internal_notes: Standard return within 30-day window. US region.
